description_long: This is a large Ferris wheel with a circular steel frame supported by a robust A-frame structure at its base. The wheel features multiple evenly spaced passenger cabins, each suspended from the rim and designed to rotate as the wheel turns, providing panoramic views. The cabins are enclosed and appear to be constructed from metal with visible safety bars and seating inside. The central hub is decorated with a sunburst-like ornamental cover on one side, while the opposite side exposes the wheel's mechanical spokes and axle. The structure is predominantly painted in shades of blue and gray, with some metallic and dark accents on the cabins and support beams. There are no visible illumination features or decorative lights on the wheel, and the asset is shown in isolation without any surrounding buildings or landscape.
description: A large blue and gray Ferris wheel with multiple enclosed passenger cabins, supported by a sturdy A-frame base and featuring a decorative sunburst hub on one side.
description_view_0: Side view showing the narrow profile of the Ferris wheel, with the A-frame supports and cabins aligned in a single row.
description_view_1: Frontal view displaying the full circular structure, all passenger cabins, and the exposed mechanical spokes of the wheel.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, highlighting the alignment of the cabins and the A-frame supports.
description_view_3: Rear frontal view showing the decorative sunburst hub at the center and the full arrangement of cabins around the wheel.
